name: Walnut Bread - Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread machine or set to bake mode.
2. Place all ingredients (except liquids and yeast) into the bread pan.
3. Add liquid ingredients, including water, into the designated compartment.
4. Add the yeast to the yeast holder.
5. Close the lid securely.
6. Press start to begin baking.
